findings.title: IntelligenzaArtificiale/Free-Auto-GPT
findings.description: Free Auto GPT with NO paids API is a repository that offers a simple version of Auto GPT, an autonomous AI agent capable of performing tasks independently. Unlike other versions, our implementation does not rely on any paid OpenAI API, making it accessible to anyone.

findings.title: edmar/whenx
findings.description: Event-Driven Autonomous Agents. create alerts in the form of "When X happens, then do Y". In this initial version, we are only supporting email alerts in the form of "When X happens, send me an email report".

findings.title: Eric-LLMs/LLMs-Lab
findings.description: Full-stack LLM Engineering Lab. Features: Autonomous Agents (ReAct/AutoGPT) | Fine-Tuning Llama/Mistral (SFT/DPO) | Large Model Deployment (DeepSeek 671B / 2.5-bit) | Advanced RAG (Hybrid Search) | Function Calling (Stream/Text-to-SQL/External APIs) | Frameworks (LangChain, Semantic Kernel, OpenAI) | Daily SOTA Paper Tracking. From theory to 0-to-1

findings.title: RhythrosaLabs/otto-mate-2
findings.description: Ottomate — your universal AI agent workbench. Give it a goal — it plans, codes, browses, and delivers autonomously. 190+ connectors, advanced multimedia creative suite, browser automation, visual pipelines, 200+ skills, cron task scheduler, and more

findings.title: ChhunT17/Autonomous-AI-Agent
findings.description: 🤖 Monitor $BTB on Twitter, engage with the community, and provide real-time information using AI-powered responses for BTB Finance.

findings.title: UdayTeja21/Autogpt
findings.description: AutoGPT is an AI-powered automation system that can independently plan, reason, and execute tasks with minimal human input. It integrates large language models with real-world tools (APIs, web automation, file operations, workflows) to create a fully autonomous agent capable of solving complex tasks.

findings.title: GravityZenAI/AI-Bastion
findings.description: 8-Layer Security Blueprint for Autonomous AI Agents. Defense-in-depth for OpenClaw, LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGPT, and any AI agent on Linux.
